vBRIEFInfo.description: Implement Option 1 from the issue: speckit Phase 4 emits scope vBRIEFs per implementation phase. plan.vbrief.json reverts to session-todo role. Migrator converts existing speckit projects.

plan.title: speckit Phase 4 collides with plan.vbrief.json definition (no scope vBRIEFs emitted)

narratives.Problem: speckit.md Phase 4 writes project task list to plan.vbrief.json, but vbrief.md defines plan.vbrief.json as session-level agent-private todo list. Same filename, two contradictory roles. Result: speckit projects bypass lifecycle folders entirely; ROADMAP.md is empty; PROJECT-DEFINITION items registry is empty; any future agent honoring the session-todo contract overwrites the project plan. Decision 2026-04-20: implement Option 1 (speckit emits scope vBRIEFs).
narratives.Action: Update deft/strategies/speckit.md Phase 4: each implementation phase (IP-1..IP-N) writes to vbrief/pending/YYYY-MM-DD-ip<NNN>-<slug>.vbrief.json as a scope vBRIEF with status pending. Carry narrative.Acceptance, narrative.Traces (FR/NFR/IP IDs), references[] to parent spec, metadata.dependencies (mirrors current edges[].blocks). plan.vbrief.json reverts to session todos with planRef to the current scope. Add migrator path in scripts/migrate_vbrief.py: given a speckit-shaped plan.vbrief.json, emit one scope vBRIEF per IP and clear plan.items. Update vbrief/vbrief.md: document filename convention ip<NNN> 3-digit padded (Risk 5), canonical narrative keys Description/Acceptance/Traces (Risk 7), plan.metadata.dependencies plan-level placement (Risk 6).
narratives.Test: tests/cli/test_migrate_vbrief.py: speckit-plan fixture (plan.vbrief.json with IP-1..IP-N items) migrates to N scope vBRIEFs in vbrief/pending/ with correct filename stems, narratives, and references. Content test for speckit.md Phase 4 describing scope emission. Content test for vbrief.md documenting filename convention, narrative keys, and dependency placement.
narratives.Outcome: speckit projects plug into Model 2 cleanly: lifecycle commands work, task roadmap:render produces meaningful output, task project:render populates items registry, #435 aggregator naturally renders speckit plans. Model collision resolved.

items.title: Update speckit.md Phase 4 to emit scope vBRIEFs in vbrief/pending/
Document filename convention ip<NNN> 3-digit padded in vbrief.md (Risk 5)
Document plan.metadata.dependencies plan-level placement in vbrief.md (Risk 6)
Document canonical narrative keys Description/Acceptance/Traces in vbrief.md (Risk 7)
Add migration tests for speckit-plan -> scope vBRIEF emission
Add content tests for speckit.md and vbrief.md updates
Revert plan.vbrief.json to session-todo role in agent guidance
